2606.10718.title: Transformer Based Model for Spatiotemporal Feature Learning in EEG Emotion Recognition
2606.10718.paper_summary: Electroencephalography (EEG) is a widely adopted technique for monitoring brain activity, offering valuable insights into neurological states due to its high temporal resolution and cost-effectiveness. To enhance the analysis of complex EEG data, we propose EEG-TransNet, an architecture designed to capture temporal, regional, and synchronous features of EEG signals. EEG-TransNet introduces three key modules: 1) a preprocessing and feature extraction module leveraging ResNet and wavelet-based denoising, 2) a Local Self-Attention Block for regional feature learning, and 3) a Fuzzy-Attention Synchronous Transformer (FAST) to model spatiotemporal dependencies. Through extensive experiments on three EEG datasets (BETA, SEED, and DepEEG), the proposed model consistently outperforms other methods in terms of classification accuracy and robustness across varying signal lengths. Ablation studies confirm the contribution of the Local Self-Attention Block in improving performance, and the inclusion of depthwise separable convolutions in the decoder reduces computational complexity while maintaining high accuracy. EEG-TransNet's ability to generalize across subjects with minimal performance variation highlights its potential as a robust tool for EEG-based brain activity classification and emotion recognition tasks.
2606.10718.paper_summary_zh: 腦電圖 (EEG) 是一種廣泛採用的監測腦部活動的技術，由於其高時間解析度和成本效益，提供了對神經狀態的寶貴見解。為了增強對複雜 EEG 數據的分析，我們提出了 EEG-TransNet，一種旨在捕捉 EEG 信號的時間、區域和同步特徵的架構。EEG-TransNet 引入了三個關鍵模塊：1) 一個利用 ResNet 和基於小波的去噪的預處理和特徵提取模塊，2) 一個用於區域特徵學習的局部自注意力模塊，以及 3) 一個模擬時空依賴性的模糊注意力同步Transformer (FAST)。通過對三個 EEG 數據集 (BETA、SEED 和 DepEEG) 的廣泛實驗，所提出的模型在分類準確性和在不同信號長度下的穩健性方面始終優於其他方法。消融研究確認了局部自注意力模塊在提高性能方面的貢獻，而在解碼器中包含深度可分離卷積則降低了計算複雜性，同時保持高準確性。EEG-TransNet 在受試者之間的泛化能力及其性能變化最小的特點，突顯了其作為一種穩健工具在基於 EEG 的腦部活動分類和情感識別任務中的潛力。
2606.10718.author: Xinglong Cui et.al.
